name: Agent
description: A spy and thief built around Infiltration and Subterfuge, specializing in getting in, getting information, and getting out unseen.
source: Spheres of Guile (stats are a reasonable estimate, not yet cross-checked against the wiki)

name: Courser
description: A wilderness survivor built around Navigation and Survivalism, keeping a group fed, oriented, and alive on the road.
source: Spheres of Guile (stats are a reasonable estimate, not yet cross-checked against the wiki)

name: Envoy
description: An inspiring virtuoso built around Communication and Performance, moving people with words, music, or presence.
source: Spheres of Guile (stats are a reasonable estimate, not yet cross-checked against the wiki)

name: Mastermind
description: A planner built around Investigation and Faction, exploiting weaknesses and pulling strings rather than acting directly.
source: Spheres of Guile (stats are a reasonable estimate, not yet cross-checked against the wiki)

name: Professional
description: A generalist expert who can be built around almost any single skill sphere, becoming a true specialist in whatever field is chosen.
source: Spheres of Guile (stats are a reasonable estimate, not yet cross-checked against the wiki)
